DatePicker.valueStateText: Please select a valid start date (cannot be in the past)
End date must be after start date

Input.placeholder: Click here to select or add members

MessageStrip.text: You can change any occupant as the primary occupant; they will be the contact person
Add only the facilities you need. Person-wise quantity facilities also let you choose whether they apply once for the booking or daily.

Input.valueStateText: Please enter a valid company name

TextArea.valueStateText: Please enter a valid company address (minimum 10 characters)

MessageStrip.text: {= 'Security deposit to be paid at check-in: ' + ${HostelModel>/Deposit} + ' ' + ${HostelModel>/DepositCurrency}}
